message:
test(json_parity): add DROPIN-172 comprehensive JSON mode unit tests (bd-3p29k)

Massive expansion of JSON mode parity test coverage with exhaustive tests
for event framing, schema edge cases, ordering invariants, auto-compaction
and retry lifecycle, and extension/tool event edge cases. This adds ~1900
lines of deterministic test coverage.

Key test areas in this batch (tests 34+):

Event content edge cases:
- Empty text content in tool output (valid for no-stdout commands)
- Unicode content preservation (emoji, CJK, RTL characters)
- Multiple content blocks in single tool output
- Very large tool args (128KB+ payload)
- Deeply nested JSON args (10+ levels)

Schema correctness:
- ToolExecutionUpdate partial result structure
- Tool execution events with empty/null args
- Extension error event with and without extensionId
- Auto-compaction start/end event schema
- Auto-retry start/end event schema with attempt tracking

Ordering and lifecycle invariants:
- Complete agent lifecycle with tool calls
- Multiple sequential tool executions maintain isolation
- Turn boundaries contain tool execution events correctly
- Message events bracket tool execution events properly

Extension event filtering:
- Auto-compaction events excluded from extension forwarding
- Auto-retry events excluded from extension forwarding
- Extension error events excluded (prevent recursive dispatch)
- All forwarded events include well-formed payloads

Response and display parity:
- ExtensionUiResponse field completeness
- ExtensionEventName exhaustive Display coverage
- Tool output serialization round-trip fidelity

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
